rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Use assign only for implementation-level output features or declared auxiliary variables.
generic_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in valid AADL scopes matching component type or implementation.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Generated AGREE code must use only visible identifiers from the input AADL model.
Avoid redeclaring AADL features as AGREE variables; they are already in scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for type-level assumptions and guarantees.
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings and assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not present in the model.
Do not redeclare AADL ports as AGREE variables.
